# Index Data Feeds

> Real-time index calculation and dissemination (equity indices, sector indices, style indices, thematic indices)

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** indices · index-data · market-barometer · performance-tracking · real-time-calc

## What this does

Real-time index calculation and dissemination (equity indices, sector indices, style indices, thematic indices)

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **index_code** *(text, required)* — Index Code (e.g. ALSI, TOP40, FINI, RAFI)
- **index_name** *(text, required)* — Index Name
- **index_type** *(select, required)* — Type (Equity, Sector, Style, Thematic, Factor)
- **base_date** *(date, required)* — Base Date (index inception)
- **base_level** *(number, required)* — Base Level (starting point, typically 1000 or 10000)
- **constituent_count** *(number, optional)* — Number of Constituents
- **current_level** *(number, required)* — Current Index Level
- **change_pct** *(number, optional)* — Change (%) from prior close

## What must be true

- **calculation → constituent_selection:** Constituents selected per published methodology (market cap, liquidity, sector weights)
- **calculation → weighting:** Indices are typically market-cap weighted or equal-weighted per methodology
- **calculation → rebalance:** Rebalancing frequency defined per index (quarterly, semi-annual, annual)
- **calculation → corporate_actions:** Index adjusted for splits, dividends (price-return vs total-return variants)
- **dissemination → real_time:** Index levels calculated and disseminated in real-time during trading hours
- **dissemination → calculation_frequency:** Indices updated at least every 5 seconds during trading
- **dissemination → price_source:** Index prices sourced from latest traded/quoted prices only
- **variants → price_return:** Excludes dividend income; tracks pure price appreciation
- **variants → total_return:** Includes reinvested dividends; shows total investor return

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Calculate Index Level** — when constituent_count gt 0, then call service; emit index.calculated. _Why: Calculate current index level from constituent prices._
- **Disseminate Index Data** — when current_level exists, then emit index.disseminated. _Why: Disseminate index level and analytics to subscribers._
- **Rebalance Constituents** — when rebalance_frequency exists, then emit index.rebalanced. _Why: Perform periodic rebalancing of index constituents._
- **Adjust Corporate Action** — when ca_type exists, then emit index.adjusted. _Why: Adjust index for corporate actions (splits, special dividends)._

## Errors it can return

- `INDEX_CALCULATION_FAILED` — Index level calculation failed
- `CONSTITUENT_DATA_MISSING` — Missing price data for one or more constituents

## Events

**`index.calculated`**
  Payload: `index_code`, `current_level`, `change_pct`, `calculation_time`

**`index.disseminated`**
  Payload: `index_code`, `current_level`, `subscribers_count`

**`index.rebalanced`**
  Payload: `index_code`, `rebalance_date`, `constituent_changes`

**`index.adjusted`**
  Payload: `index_code`, `adjustment_reason`, `adjustment_factor`

## Connects to

- **reference-data-management** *(required)*
- **market-data-mitch-udp** *(recommended)*
